treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Elective procedure for right hip osteoarthritis (OA)
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient tolerated the procedure and was in good spirits post-operatively.

treatment_timeline.event: Elective total hip arthroplasty (THA) performed due to right hip osteoarthritis not amenable to conservative treatment.
Medications prescribed including pain management and anticoagulation.
Patient discharged to extended care facility with specific follow-up instructions.

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory but requires assistance (walker or cane)
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Physical therapy recommended; partial weight bearing on right lower extremity.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient is expected to improve with follow-up therapy.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Requires assistance for ambulation; overall mental status is clear and coherent.
